Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Tamarah Prevost, Esq. 415-438-4530 altair law for Plaintiff (In-person)
Jonathan Pearce, Esq. Steve Moore, esq. 415-469-1209 Fox Rothschild for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Pearce, counsel for Defense contests the tentative ruling and presents arguments.
Ms. Prevost informs the court status of emils and text messages. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SETARE MEHR's Motion To Compel Planned Lifestyle Services, Inc.S Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Certian Of Defendants' Employment Form Interrogatories, Set One
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. TAMARAH PREVOST, Esq. of Cotchet, Pitre & McCarthy, LLP (tel: 650-697-6000) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JONATHAN PEARCE, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Fox Rothschild LLP (tel: 415-364-5540) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT PLANNED BUILDING SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Certain Of Defendants' Employment Form Interrogatories, Set One.

Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling. Both parties stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Aaron Minnis. Counsel Tamarah Prevost signs the stipulation in open court. Counsel Jonathan Pearce authorizes the clerk to sign the stipulation on his behalf. Matter argued and submitted as to RFAs 9 and 10. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified.

Granted for the reasons set forth in the Court's order dated November 20, 2024. Denied only as to RFAs 9 and 10 and their counterparts.

Counsel Jonathan Pearce is to prepare a proposed order and email it to Judge Pro Tem Aaron Minnis at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com .

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)
